fullExtractedText: JACOB CHAFFIN FULLSTACK ENGINEERBEVERLY HILLS 90210, UNITED STATES6503803288 DETAILS Beverly Hills 90210 United States 6503803288 jchaffin57@gmail.com LINKS Github LinkedIn Website SKILLS Applied AI/LLMs/ML Node.js/Typescript/React Python WebRTC Conversational AI LLMs PROFILE Full-stack engineer with 7+ years building and operating production systems across real-time infrastructure and applied AI. I run Kubernetes-based infrastructure for GPU-backed inference and low-latency streaming services, and I ship backend APIs and product features end-to-end with a focus on reliability under real traffic. Experienced across Python, TypeScript, Next.js, React, and modern LLM-powered systems. EMPLOYMENT HISTORY Principal AI Engineer at ProsodyAI Oct 2024 Present Architected and shipped a production real-time conversational intelligence platform performing pre ASR acoustic feature extraction (pitch contours, spectral energy, cadence, pause structure) with sub 200ms streaming inference for live agent guidance and post call analytics. Designed state space inspired temporal models (SSM/Mamba style) that convert continuous speech into structured signals (tone, intent, emotion), achieving ~75% classification accuracy in controlled evaluations and improving downstream intent detection. Implemented robust audio augmentation pipelines (noise injection, pitch/tempo variation, room impulse simulation) to improve model generalization across diverse acoustic environments. Built GPU accelerated distributed inference services (PyTorch + CUDA) with dynamic batching, INT8 quantization, and autoscaling to meet strict latency and throughput SLAs. Deployed production telemetry, distributed tracing, and concept drift monitoring to detect signal degradation and accelerate incident response. Delivered developer facing APIs powering CRM integrations, post call analytics, and predictive signaling workflows used in production. Tech: Python, PyTorch, CUDA, Kubernetes, State Space Models, Streaming Inference, Audio DSP, Telemetry, Distributed Systems Software Engineer at Uniphore Jun 2021 Oct 2024 Developed modular UI components and dynamic pages for agent-assist tools using Next.js, React, and GraphQL, integrating live ASR and voice analytics. Engineered real-time sentiment visualization layers with phonetic and lexical embeddings for enhanced client-side rendering. Streamlined SSR/ISR logic for data-heavy voice sessions, improving initial load times by 35%. Modernized analytics pipelines to support LLM-driven conversational interfaces, implementing deep tone-aware inference. Built internal analytics tools with NumPy, Pandas, Jupyter, and Python for behavioral insights. AI Associate at Wave Computing, Campbell, CA Jun 2018 Sept 2020 Built custom TensorFlow ops to simulate neural network execution on the DPU Compiler, enabling early validation of operator behavior and alignment with hardware constraints. Developed and optimized neural networks for audio and vision classification using PyTorch. Designed and maintained an interactive visualization tool for error tracing on Wave's proprietary DPU-based compiler. Developed full-stack admin tools with Node.js, React, and GraphQL for secure login and data transfer to AWS S3, deployed via Docker containers. Reduced API payload size by 40% and streamlined file management workflows. EDUCATION BS, University of California, Los Angeles Sept 2017 Dec 2020 Linguistics and Computer Science PROJECTS Sparke Tutor, Beverly Hills, CA Sept 2025 2026 Built a real-time mobile tutoring system with a conversational avatar over WebRTC. Architected a LiveKit-based agent to handle live audio, video, and screen-sharing, and grounded the LLM tutor via a LiveKit DataChannel that injects studyset/topic context and tracks progression state to constrain responses to assigned materials. Designed and deployed a Node.js authentication and token service on GCP (JWT + LiveKit access tokens) with Twilio SMS verification, and implemented a Kafka-driven ELO feedback pipeline to dynamically adapt student progression. Tech: Node.js, LiveKit, WebRTC, LLMs, Kafka, Twilio, GCP AureliaStudio.ai Built a multi-tenant voice AI platform for luxury MedSpas. Orchestrated real-time booking, payments, memberships, and intake flows using a LangGraph state machine with dynamic STT/LLM/TTS routing (including Orpheus TTS) per call. Deployed LiveKit Cloud (WebRTC + SIP), Apollo Federation across 5 GraphQL services, Stripe Connect for per-tenant payments, and AWS infrastructure provisioned via Terraform. Tech: LangGraph, LiveKit, Orpheus TTS, GraphQL, AWS (EKS, RDS, DynamoDB, Kafka), Terraform, Stripe Connect
